title: BEM-765 route runtime
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff','governance/tasks/pending']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:09 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
prev=load('governance/state/bem764_check_claude_runtime_after_guard.json')
prev_status=prev.get('status','unknown')
if prev_status=='claude_response_found':
    status='route_process_real_claude_response'
    next_action='process real Claude response and finalize/continue agreement'
    blocker=None
elif prev_status=='claude_runtime_seen_no_response':
    status='route_inspect_claude_action_outcome'
    next_action='inspect Claude action outcome and provider/secret availability without exposing secrets'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_RUNTIME_SEEN_NO_RESPONSE','outcome':prev.get('claude_outcome')}
else:
    status='route_build_direct_state_dispatch_fallback'
    next_action='build direct state-producing dispatcher fallback because workflow runtime proof is absent'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_RUNTIME_STILL_NOT_PROVEN','previous_status':prev_status}
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-765 ROUTE AFTER RUNTIME CHECK'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous: '+prev_status+sep+'Route: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem765_next_runtime_repair.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-765 Next Runtime Repair'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous: '+prev_status+sep+'Route: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
state={'schema_version':'route_after_bem764_runtime_check.v1','bem':'BEM-765','status':status,'previous_status':prev_status,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem765_route_after_bem764_runtime_check.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem765_route_after_bem764_runtime_check.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-765 | Route After BEM-764 Runtime Check | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous: '+prev_status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem765_route_after_bem764_runtime_check','status':status,'previous_status':prev_status,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem765_route_after_bem764_runtime_check.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-765 '+status+' previous='+prev_status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(handoff),str(pending),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-764 runtime check and created next active repair artifact before any checkpoint')
"""
No issue comments.
